author: Hz & Claude
description: Turn note titles in a folder into your word bank: in-text highlighting, hover definitions, FSRS spaced-repetition review, auto-collected occurrences, and a review heatmap. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Hz & Claude
manifest.description: Turn note titles in a folder into your word bank: in-text highlighting, hover definitions, FSRS spaced-repetition review, auto-collected occurrences, and a review heatmap.
manifest.name: Lexis

name: Lexis

releases.author: Heptazero
releases.description:
First public release for Obsidian community plugin submission.

- Folder-as-word-bank highlighting + hover definitions
- FSRS spaced-repetition review with heatmap
- Auto-collected occurrences, typed bidirectional relations
- Optional companion browser extension via a local 127.0.0.1 bridge (token auth, data never leaves your machine)

Install: copy main.js, manifest.json, styles.css into <vault>/.obsidian/plugins/lexis/ and enable in Community plugins.
